name: Sardinian Pasta with Tomato Basil
recipeIngredient: 1 pound imported ferula sarda grosso pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil and add the required amount of salt.
2. Add the pasta to the boiling water and cook for 30 minutes at a boil.
3. While cooking the pasta, heat olive oil in a saucepot.
4. Add the tomatoes over low heat and season with salt and pepper.
5. Cook the tomatoes for 10 minutes before adding the basil leaves.
6. Continue cooking for an additional 5 minutes.
7. Drain the pasta in a colander and transfer to a serving bowl.
8. Stir butter into the tomato sauce.
9. Add the cooked tomato sauce to the pasta and stir well to coat the pasta evenly.
10. Serve the dish over a bed of pasta.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
